project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) - React/Vite frontend + Express/PostgreSQL backend
build_system: npm with tsc for backend, Vite + tsc for frontend
test_framework: No test framework configured - validation via build only
build_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
test_command: No test command - use build verification only
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npm run build' to verify frontend compiles. 2. Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npm run build' to verify backend compiles.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install; cd ../backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet - npm packages available. No database running so cannot run migrations; validate SQL syntax only. No test suite exists.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns exactly: controllers use req.user!.care_home_id for multi-tenancy, routes use authenticate/tenantGuard middleware globally then isStaff/isManager/isClinical per route, pages use inline styles, hooks use React Query with toast notifications.
key_patterns: Backend: controllers export async functions (req,res,next), use query() from models/db, use AppError for errors. Routes: grouped in single index.ts with controller imports. Frontend: pages are single-file components with inline styles, hooks/index.ts has all React Query hooks, services/api.ts has all API client methods, types/index.ts has all interfaces, App.tsx has NAV_ALL array for sidebar + Routes for pages.
directory_structure: backend/migrations/ - SQL migrations (001-012). backend/src/controllers/ - one file per feature domain. backend/src/routes/index.ts - all routes. frontend/src/pages/ - one file per page. frontend/src/hooks/index.ts - all React Query hooks. frontend/src/services/api.ts - all Axios API clients. frontend/src/types/index.ts - all TypeScript types.
